response.justification: Over 15 years of continuous fullstack work with TypeScript, Node.js, and React directly covering the primary stack, compounded by current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development at re:cinq — the role's most distinctive requirement. High-throughput backend work at Dunnhumby, cloud-native delivery at Optilyz (AWS CDK, MongoDB), and a consistent TDD/craftsmanship track record round out a strong technical profile. The main gap is no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin signal.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React ownership across multiple production environments at scale
Active AI agent and Model Context Protocol tooling work at current role — rare and directly relevant
Strong testing discipline: TDD practice, authored open-source test runner and assertion library
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being a primary framework requirement
Kotlin absent and Java exposure is narrow (robotics tooling at Altom), leaving the secondary stack thin
Relational database depth (PostgreSQL) is not demonstrated; MongoDB is the only database with explicit production context
